mapper.select: select gm.gm_id as id, gm.gm_code as memberCode, gm.gm_name as memberName, gm.tel as phone, gm.province_id as provinceId, gp.province_name as provinceName, gm.city_id as cityId, gc.city_name as cityName, (case when gm.state = 0 then 1 else 2 end) as status from grid_member gm left join grid_province gp on gm.province_id = gp.province_id left join grid_city gc on gm.city_id = gc.city_id where gm.province_id=#{provinceId} and gm.city_id=#{cityId}

select gm.gm_id as id, gm.gm_code as memberCode, gm.gm_name as memberName, gm.tel as phone, gm.province_id as provinceId, gp.province_name as provinceName, gm.city_id as cityId, gc.city_name as cityName, (case when gm.state = 0 then 1 else 2 end) as status from grid_member gm left join grid_province gp on gm.province_id = gp.province_id left join grid_city gc on gm.city_id = gc.city_id where gm.province_id != #{provinceId} and gm.state = 0
